EInvoice.Settings.subline: Manage your Peppol participant registration, Leitweg-IDs for German public-sector invoicing, and e-invoice compliance settings.
EInvoice.Settings.PeppolCard.emptyBody: Register your organisation once to send XRechnung e-invoices to UK public-sector buyers and receive delivery acknowledgements.
EInvoice.Settings.LeitwegIdCard.emptyBod: Add a Leitweg-ID for each German public-sector buyer you invoice. You can set defaults per contractor and per-contract overrides.
EInvoice.InvoicesList.Filter.label: Filter by compliance
EInvoice.InvoicesList.Empty.heading: No invoices in this state
EInvoice.InvoicesList.Empty.body: Try a different filter or clear filters to see all invoices.
EInvoice.InvoiceTab.generationNotGenerat: No XRechnung XML has been generated for this invoice yet.
EInvoice.InvoiceTab.downloadXmlHelper: Expires in 5 minutes — generate a fresh link if needed.
EInvoice.InvoiceTab.validationNotValidat: Validation has not run yet. Finalize the invoice to validate against KoSIT.
EInvoice.InvoiceTab.downloadReportHelper: Opens the full KoSIT HTML report with rule highlighting.
EInvoice.InvoiceTab.transmissionNotSentB: This e-invoice has not been transmitted.
EInvoice.InvoiceTab.leitwegMissingWarnin: Leitweg-ID missing for German public-sector buyer
This buyer is marked as public-sector. Add a Leitweg-ID to this contractor or contract before sending.
EInvoice.LeitwegIdDialog.valueHelper: Format: coarse digits (2–12) + optional refinement (up to 30 uppercase alphanumerics) + 2-digit check digit. Example: 1234567890-AGENCY-56.
EInvoice.LeitwegIdDialog.descriptionHelp: Internal label — e.g. “Bundesministerium für Finanzen, Abt. IV”.
EInvoice.LeitwegIdDialog.contractLabel: Or assign to a specific contract (overrides contractor default)
EInvoice.LeitwegIdDialog.defaultToggle: Set as default for this contractor
EInvoice.LeitwegIdDialog.errorInvalidChe: This Leitweg-ID's check digit doesn't match the coarse + refinement parts. Please double-check with your public-sector buyer.
EInvoice.LeitwegIdDialog.errorInvalidFor: Leitweg-ID must be 2–12 digits, optionally followed by `-<up to 30 uppercase alphanumerics>`, then `-<2-digit check digit>`.
EInvoice.LeitwegIdDialog.errorDuplicate: This Leitweg-ID is already registered in your organisation.
EInvoice.PeppolDialog.registerBody: Registering enables sending XRechnung e-invoices to UK public-sector buyers via Peppol. Your participant ID will be listed in the Peppol SML.
EInvoice.PeppolDialog.schemeHelper: `0060` = UK Companies House, `0088` = GLN, `0106` = Dun & Bradstreet.
EInvoice.PeppolDialog.valueHelper: Companies House number, GLN, or DUNS — whatever your scheme requires.
EInvoice.PeppolDialog.pendingBody: Storecove is registering your participant with the Peppol SML. This typically takes a few minutes. We'll update the status automatically.
EInvoice.Errors.LEITWEG_ID_MISSING: Leitweg-ID missing for this German public-sector buyer. Add one to the contractor or contract before sending via Peppol.
EInvoice.Errors.PARTICIPANT_NOT_REACHABL: The recipient isn't registered on Peppol or doesn't support XRechnung. Confirm the buyer's Peppol ID and try again.
EInvoice.Errors.KOSIT_VALIDATION_FAILED: This e-invoice didn't pass KoSIT validation. Review the validation report and re-finalize after correcting the invoice data.
EInvoice.Errors.PEPPOL_PARTICIPANT_NOT_A: Register your organisation on Peppol before sending e-invoices. Go to Settings → E-invoicing to start.
EInvoice.Errors.STORECOVE_TRANSMISSION_F: Peppol transmission failed. We'll retry automatically — you can also retry manually from the E-invoice tab.
EInvoice.Errors.Generic: Something went wrong. Try refreshing or contact support if this persists.
EInvoice.intake.pageSubtitle: Inbound XRechnung and ZUGFeRD invoices awaiting review
EInvoice.intake.dropZonePrimary: Drop an XRechnung XML or ZUGFeRD PDF here
EInvoice.intake.dropZoneSecondary: or click to choose a file (max 5 MB, .xml or .pdf)
EInvoice.intake.uploadNetworkError: Upload failed. Check your connection and try again.
EInvoice.intake.ctaCreateContractor: Create new contractor from this data
EInvoice.intake.emptyStateBody: Inbound XRechnung XML and ZUGFeRD PDF files appear here. Use 'Import e-invoice' from the invoices page to upload one.
EInvoice.intake.errorXsdReject: The XML does not conform to the CII schema — ask the sender to re-issue. First errors: {errors}
EInvoice.intake.errorNoXmlAttachment: This PDF does not contain an embedded XRechnung/ZUGFeRD XML attachment. Only ZUGFeRD-conformant PDFs can be imported.
EInvoice.intake.errorLevelTooLow: This invoice uses the {level} ZUGFeRD profile, which lacks line-item data. Ask the sender to provide a COMFORT or XRECHNUNG profile.
EInvoice.intake.errorFileTooLarge: File exceeds 5 MB. Ask the sender for a smaller file.
EInvoice.intake.errorGeneric: The file could not be imported. Please try again or contact support.
EInvoice.intake.bannerExtendedBestEffort: This invoice uses the EXTENDED ZUGFeRD profile. Some sender-specific fields could not be mapped. Review the data carefully before converting.
EInvoice.intake.rejectDialogBody: Rejected imports remain in the audit log but cannot be converted to an invoice. This action cannot be undone.
EInvoice.intake.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Reason (required) — e.g., duplicate, wrong recipient, sender mistake
EInvoice.intake.genFailureToast: ZUGFeRD generation failed. Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
EInvoice.intake.zugferdSectionBody: Generate a PDF/A-3 invoice with an embedded XRechnung CII XML attachment.
EInvoice.intake.noMatchCandidatesBody: No existing contractor matches this supplier. Create a new one from the parsed data.
